metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_43
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Rab27b is present on a subset of synaptic vesicles where it is involved in the regulating of SV recycling.

Uniprot: has lipid anchor. Experimental description: Sequencing of cDNA encoded by plasmid. Not mentioned in the paper.

19/01/2017 Pim
Note: please note that the expert that created this annotation is part of the lab that created this publication. The species information is therefore derived from direct communication with the authors.

3/2/2017 Pim:
Note: the Rab27b protein is shown to be preset in rat preparations with antibodies (Fig.5). In Fig 7 Rab27b is shown to have functional consequens for SV release. For the CC anotation the rat data is sufficient; I corrected the species to Rat.
